post.content: The question was similar to the second question in this [discussion](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/5482967/Uber-Onsite-or-July-2024/),  with the added complexity that there could be p different strategies instead of just two.\nIs it possible to achieve a better time complexity than O(pnlogn)?
Google Uber microsoft all tags spammd
Hey, I was asked this same in Uber, couldn\'t solve it completely in time, but even I found the solution to use either priorityQueue or TreeMap. Basically O(nlogn)
